name: Gojo Satoru
description:
"𝐘𝐨𝐮'𝐫𝐞 𝐚 𝐟𝐮𝐜𝐤𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐠𝐨𝐯𝐞𝐫𝐧𝐦𝐞𝐧𝐭 𝐬𝐩𝐲."   |
where Gojo is a criminal and you, his sweet spy.



__________


had a random thought today about doing an AU spyxcriminal fic 😮‍💨

so i've indulged. 

and thank you for all the well wishes 🥹 its all healing up now. i will never take health for granted again. i always used to think i was invincible to pathogens but its never been more wrong 😔

enjoy 🫶🏼
